What Copper Beacon actually does for your business.

The technical work behind getting found, chosen, and hired by more local customers — on Google, in AI search, and everywhere else.

Service 01

Local search optimization

Your business ranking in Google's local results — the Map Pack, organic results, and "near me" searches. For most local service businesses, local SEO is the single highest-ROI marketing channel.

When someone searches for a service near them, the businesses that show up in the top three Map Pack results get roughly 44% of all clicks. Local SEO is the difference between a phone that rings and a phone that doesn't.

What's included

  • Local keyword research and content strategy
  • On-page SEO (titles, metadata, structured data, site speed)
  • Technical SEO audit and fixes
  • Local citations and directory presence
  • Competitive analysis and gap closure
  • Monthly ranking and traffic reporting

What's included

  • Full profile optimization (categories, services, attributes, hours, description)
  • Weekly Google Posts
  • Photo management and regular updates
  • Q&A monitoring and response
  • Service area and business info maintenance
  • Google Business Profile insights reporting
Service 02

Google Business Profile management

Your Google Business Profile is often the single most important piece of your online presence. A properly optimized, actively managed profile produces calls, direction requests, and website visits directly from Google Search and Maps.

Businesses with active, optimized Google Business Profiles generate 2–5x more calls than those with neglected profiles. Most small businesses set their profile up once and never touch it again. That's a leak, and we plug it.

Service 03

Review generation & reputation management

Reviews are the #1 trust signal for local customers — and they heavily influence how Google, Bing, and AI assistants rank and recommend your business. We build automated systems that ethically request reviews from happy customers and keep your rating climbing.

Going from 25 reviews at a 4.3 average to 80 reviews at a 4.7 average can double your conversion rate from searchers to customers. Reviews compound. The earlier you start systematizing them, the faster you pull ahead of competitors.

What's included

  • Automated review request flows (text and email)
  • Integration with your CRM, booking system, or point-of-sale
  • Review response management (all platforms)
  • Negative review mitigation strategy
  • Reputation monitoring across Google, Yelp, Facebook, industry-specific sites
  • Monthly reputation dashboard

What's included

  • Visibility audits across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, and Bing Copilot
  • Content optimized for AI assistant citation
  • Structured data and schema markup tuned for LLM understanding
  • Authoritative content development (the kind AI assistants cite)
  • Monthly AI visibility reporting
  • Competitive tracking of who's being recommended in your market
Service 04

AI search visibility (GEO)

When customers ask ChatGPT "who's the best orthodontist in Iowa City?" or ask Gemini "I need a plumber near me" — AI assistants give direct recommendations. Most local businesses have no idea whether they're being recommended or not. We track it, optimize for it, and make sure you show up in AI answers.

AI-mediated search is growing fast. Within 18–24 months, a significant portion of "find me a local service" queries will happen inside AI assistants rather than traditional search engines. The businesses that optimize for this shift now will dominate. The ones that wait will spend years trying to catch up.

Ready to let the customers find you?

Fifteen minutes. No pitch. Just a real conversation about whether we can help.

Book a free 15-minute call
